message:
feat: Implement RFC 2822 dates, config interpolation, base64, maildir ops, locale parsing

email.zig - RFC 2822 date formatting and parsing:
- formatdate(): Real timestamp to "Day, DD Mon YYYY HH:MM:SS +0000" format
- parsedate(): Parse RFC 2822 dates back to structured data
- Uses std.time.epoch for date calculations

configparser.zig - Extended variable interpolation:
- ExtendedInterpolation.beforeGet(): Real ${section:option} interpolation
- Recursive interpolation with depth limit
- Looks up values in section, then defaults

plistlib.zig - Base64 data encoding:
- Encode binary data to base64 for <data> elements
- Line-wrap at 76 characters per RFC 2045

mailbox.zig - Real Maildir file operations:
- setFlags/addFlag/removeFlag: Manipulate Maildir flags (DFPRST)
- add(): Write to tmp/, move to new/ with unique filename
- remove(): Delete message files from cur/ or new/
- removeFolder(): Delete folder with subdirectories
- clean(): Remove files older than 36 hours from tmp/

gettext.zig - LANGUAGE environment variable parsing:
- Split LANGUAGE on ':' for multiple languages
- Strip .encoding and @modifier from locale names
- Fall back to LC_ALL, LC_MESSAGES, LANG
